subject: 微软
object: More than a single model, we are excited to introduce our Hill-Climbing Machine: a co-designed pipeline built to make every component of model development climbable, so capabilities improve continually and reliably over time. The aim is a repeatable system that can absorb better data, stronger rewards, more capable environments, and more compute.
source_quote: More than a single model, we are excited to introduce our Hill-Climbing Machine: a co-designed pipeline built to make every component of model development climbable, so capabilities improve continually and reliably over time. The aim is a repeatable system that can absorb better data, stronger rewards, more capable environments, and more compute.

subject: 微软
object: Introducing MAI-Thinking-1
source_quote: Introducing MAI-Thinking-1

subject: 微软
object: Today we are introducing MAI-Thinking-1, Microsoft AI’s reasoning model. It is a medium-sized model that stands among the strongest models in its weight class. It matches leading models on key software engineering benchmarks, demonstrates advanced mathematical reasoning capabilities, and is preferred to Sonnet 4.6 in our blind human side-by-side evaluations. We trained it from the ground up on enterprise grade, clean and commercially licensed data, without distillation from third-party models.
source_quote: Today we are introducing MAI-Thinking-1, Microsoft AI’s reasoning model. It is a medium-sized model that stands among the strongest models in its weight class. It matches leading models on key software engineering benchmarks, demonstrates advanced mathematical reasoning capabilities, and is preferred to Sonnet 4.6 in our blind human side-by-side evaluations. We trained it from the ground up on enterprise grade, clean and commercially licensed data, without distillation from third-party models.

subject: 微软
object: MAI-Thinking-1 is a step in our broader work to build towards Humanist Superintelligence: advanced AI capabilities designed to serve people and organizations, not to replace them. The model matters on both axes: what it can do, and how it was built.
source_quote: MAI-Thinking-1 is a step in our broader work to build towards Humanist Superintelligence: advanced AI capabilities designed to serve people and organizations, not to replace them. The model matters on both axes: what it can do, and how it was built.

subject: NVIDIA
object: NemoClaw 平台，助力工业软件厂商构建自主 AI 工程师
source_quote: Users can easily deploy NemoClaw from NVIDIA DGX Spark personal AI supercomputers, as well as through enterprise data centers and cloud service providers. NVIDIA OpenShell — the open source runtime at its core — governs how each agent accesses files, networks and tools, enforcing policy-based security at every layer.

subject: NVIDIA
object: NemoClaw 平台，助力工业软件厂商构建自主 AI 工程师
source_quote: These AI engineers are based on NVIDIA NemoClaw , an open blueprint for building specialized, long-running agents with a secure runtime and frontier models.

subject: NVIDIA
object: NemoClaw 平台，助力工业软件厂商构建自主 AI 工程师
source_quote: NemoClaw includes a choice of harness — meaning it can be integrated with various orchestration frameworks enterprises use to deploy and coordinate agents, such as OpenClaw and Hermes — as well as a model router and NVIDIA NeMo libraries for customization.

subject: NVIDIA
object: NemoClaw 平台，助力工业软件厂商构建自主 AI 工程师
source_quote: Dassault Systèmes is actively productizing the 3DEXPERIENCE Agentic Platform to operate long-running and autonomous agents for design, simulation and manufacturing operations, in a secured environment powered by NVIDIA NemoClaw and OpenShell.

subject: NVIDIA 与 Microsoft 深化
object: ，推出从设备到云的统一加速计算栈以支持 AI 智能体部署
source_quote: At Microsoft Build, NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang joined Microsoft chairman and CEO Satya Nadella’s keynote via livestream from Taipei to discuss the expanded partnership: NVIDIA RTX Spark and DGX Station for Windows , NVIDIA GPU-accelerated Microsoft Fabric, NVIDIA open models on Microsoft Foundry, the NVIDIA OpenShell secure runtime in GitHub Copilot and the next generation of NVIDIA-powered AI factories.

subject: NVIDIA 与 Microsoft 深化
object: ，推出从设备到云的统一加速计算栈以支持 AI 智能体部署
source_quote: The enterprise data layer can now keep pace with AI agents that continuously query and reason over data, the result of years of deep engineering collaboration between NVIDIA and Microsoft, from research to production.

subject: NVIDIA 与 Microsoft 深化
object: ，推出从设备到云的统一加速计算栈以支持 AI 智能体部署
source_quote: NVIDIA Partners With Microsoft on Unified Stack for Agentic AI Deployment, From Windows Devices to Cloud to Local

subject: NVIDIA 与 Microsoft 深化
object: ，推出从设备到云的统一加速计算栈以支持 AI 智能体部署
source_quote: The agentic AI moment has arrived, but delivering on its promise requires more than good models. It also takes fast hardware, secure runtimes, a responsive data layer and models tuned for long-running reasoning. NVIDIA and Microsoft are bringing that full stack to developers across Windows devices, Azure cloud and local deployments.

source_quote: The pre-launch edge most AI founders ignore

subject: Design partners: The pre-
object: edge most AI founders ignore - Bessemer Venture Partners
source_quote: Design partners: The pre-launch edge most AI founders ignore

subject: Design partners: The pre-
object: edge most AI founders ignore - Bessemer Venture Partners
source_quote: Each of those 12 partners met with the team biweekly, used early product versions, and gave structured feedback throughout. In exchange, they'd receive a discount at launch. The program ended with a hard conversion deadline: go paid, or don't.

subject: Design partners: The pre-
object: edge most AI founders ignore - Bessemer Venture Partners
source_quote: A design partner program is a structured, pre-launch arrangement between an early-stage startup and a small cohort of target customers. Design partners co-develop the product before it's built, providing structured feedback in exchange for early access and preferential pricing. Unlike beta testers, who evaluate a finished product, design partners actively shape product direction, pricing architecture, and go-to-market strategy, and are expected to convert to paying customers at the program's conclusion.

subject: Questex Used AI Agents to
object: $1 Million in 90 Days - A Media Operator
source_quote: Questex Used AI Agents to Close $1 Million in 90 Days

subject: Questex Used AI Agents to
object: $1 Million in 90 Days - A Media Operator
source_quote: When a prospective exhibitor submits a form expressing interest in a Questex trade show, an AI sales agent named Julian is on the phone within two minutes. No queue; no waiting for a sales rep to circle back. During a three-month pilot program, that speed translated into more than $1 million in closed revenue.

subject: Questex Used AI Agents to
object: $1 Million in 90 Days - A Media Operator
source_quote: For the New York City-based B2B media and events company, “Julian” is one piece of a broader AI deployment that is reshaping how the company handles exhibitor and sponsorship sales and content production across its portfolio. The results so far demonstrate how event operators can use artificial intelligence not to replace human talent, but to amplify it.

subject: Questex Used AI Agents to
object: $1 Million in 90 Days - A Media Operator
source_quote: SDR, or sales development representative, is the industry term for the front-line sales role responsible for prospecting, qualifying leads and booking meetings for senior account executives to close. At Questex, those reps were stretched thin, handling inbound qualification while also trying to run outbound campaigns that required rebuilding contact lists and messaging from scratch for each new event or industry vertical.

subject: 特朗普签署
object: ：AI 模型在上线前可提交给政府进行安全评估
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 3 日消息，美国总统唐纳德・特朗普于当地时间周二签署了一项行政令，推出人工智能企业自愿合作机制：AI 公司在前沿大模型正式发布前，可向美国联邦政府提交模型，以此“推动安全创新、强化关键基础设施网络安全防护”。

subject: 特朗普签署
object: ：AI 模型在上线前可提交给政府进行安全评估
source_quote: 该行政令提出，美国人工智能产业能够蓬勃发展，部分原因在于“美方拒绝依靠繁重冗余的监管扼杀技术创新”，但同时新规也承认，新一代人工智能技术伴随各类安全隐患。

subject: 特朗普签署
object: ：AI 模型在上线前可提交给政府进行安全评估
source_quote: 据此，行政令要求多家联邦政府机构搭建配套细则，在 AI 模型面向公众上线前，评估模型具备的高阶网络攻防能力。

subject: 特朗普签署
object: ：AI 模型在上线前可提交给政府进行安全评估
source_quote: IT之家注意到，此前特朗普曾在最后一刻暂缓签署原定版本行政令，原因是他担忧旧版条款拖累美国对华科技竞争。

subject: 微软与梅奥诊所达成
object: ，共同开发部署医疗保健领域前沿AI模型
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 3 日消息，微软今天在 Build 2026 大会宣布与梅奥诊所达成战略合作，共同开发部署医疗保健领域的前沿 AI 模型，让更多人在需要时获得梅奥诊所的医疗知识、服务模式。

subject: 微软与梅奥诊所达成
object: ，共同开发部署医疗保健领域前沿AI模型
source_quote: IT之家在此援引官方新闻稿，本次合作将整合梅奥诊所的全球医疗专业能力、去标识化临床健康数据，以及微软的先进 AI、云计算及超级智能能力，为临床推理、医疗应用场景打造前沿 AI 模型。
